item.title: Velo3D Secures $11.5M Defense Contract With Advanced 3D Printing
item.description: The contract will use Velo3D’s Rapid Production Solution along with its industrial-scale Laser Powder Bed Fusion technology to manufacture essential c...

item.title: Gemini said Amaze Announces Updated Registration Statement Filing
This Nano-Cap Stock Doubled Today — What’s Driving The Surge?

item.title: Apple Stock’s Pullback Over AI Concerns ‘Unwarranted’, Says Wedbush
item.description: The firm believes Apple’s dip is overblown, emphasizing that the company remains on course to unveil its next-generation AI features by summer.

item.title: Coinbase Stock Falls Today – Mizuho’s Price Target Cut Takes Away Nearly 40% Of Upside Potential
item.description: Mizuho analyst Dan Dolev lowered Coinbase's price target from $280 to $170, eroding nearly 40% of its upside case, according to TheFly.
